text:
特訓にもいろいろあると思うけど
的に当ててるだけじゃバレットボウは
上達しないんじゃないかなー？

強い敵を仕留めることが
上達への近道だと思うんだー。

そこでわたしが考えた訓練メニューは
ヴォル・ドラゴンを仕留めること！
難しそうでしょー？

よっぽど心を落ち着けていかないと
当てても仕留められないかもよー？

There are all sorts of ways you can go about
doing some serious bow training, but just
hitting targets isn't gonna cut it, is it?

But if you were to take on some really strong
enemies? That should get you improving fast!

So that's why my training regimen includes
taking down a Vol Dragon instead!
Sounds tough, right?

You're going to really have to compose
yourself, because not just any hit you land is
going to take that thing down.
